# Zapply Jobs — Canada Jobs 2027

> Curated entry-level, new-grad, and early-career job listings across Canada. Updated hourly. Canada-focused.

## What this repo provides
- 1,800+ entry-level job listings updated hourly
- Jobs from Canadian employers across multiple ATS platforms
- Structured data: title, company, location, apply URL, domain tags
- Enriched data: required skills, visa sponsorship, summary
- Canada-focused, entry-level and early-career roles
